nodes.context: Cuban-American organized crime group founded by José Miguel Battle Sr., involved in gambling, loansharking, drug trafficking, and murder.
Italian organized crime families in the New York City area.
Mafia crime family in Florida, led by Santo Trafficante Jr.

edges.evidence_quote: He allegedly established good working relationships with the Italian Mafia in the New York City area, but at other times the corporation had violent turf wars with various Italian mafia families.
edges.context: The Corporation had both cooperative and conflictual relationships with the Italian Mafia.
